series_metadata.series_description: Files related to resident discharge or transfer hearings, including, but not limited to, correspondence, exhibits, decisions, hearing recordings.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years after decision, then shred. If the decision is appealed, retain one year after the end of all appeals, then shred. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after decision, then shred. If the decision is appealed, retain one year after the end of all appeals, then shred., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
